tagline: Elevate your water experience with a luxury hot tub and more

hero.headline:
Mountain Living Deserves Mountain-Grade
Water Care
hero.subheadline: For over 45 years, Summit County homeowners have trusted us with their hot tubs, pools, and home water systems. From luxury spa sales to emergency repairs at 9,000 feet, we keep your water pristine so you can focus on enjoying the Colorado high life.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Hot Tubs, Pools & Water Systems<br class="hidden md:block"> Built for Mountain Living
services.subtitle: From luxury Caldera Spas to whole-home EcoWater filtration, we bring four decades of high-altitude water expertise to every job we touch.

cards.title: Luxury Hot Tub Sales
cards.description: Authorized Caldera Spas dealer offering the full Paradise, Vacanza, Utopia, and Fantasy series. We help you find the perfect spa for your mountain retreat.

cards.title: Hot Tub & Pool Repairs
cards.description: Certified technicians who diagnose and fix equipment fast. From routine fixes to emergency calls, most repairs completed in a single visit.

cards.title: Scheduled Maintenance
cards.description: Keep your hot tub or pool running flawlessly year-round with our regular maintenance plans. We handle the chemistry, cleaning, and seasonal prep.

cards.title: Water Care Products
cards.description: FreshWater Salt Systems, FROG Water Care, ozone systems, and spa enhancers. The right products to keep your water clean, clear, and gentle.

cards.title: Home Water Filtration
cards.description: EcoWater whole-home treatment systems including reverse osmosis, iron removal, and water softeners. Clean water from every tap in your home.

cards.title: Commercial Services
cards.description: Hot tub and pool maintenance for lodges, hotels, and HOA communities. Reliable service that keeps your guests happy and your property compliant.

steps.title: Book Your Free Consultation
steps.description: Tell us about your hot tub, pool, or water system. We'll schedule a visit, assess your needs, and provide an honest recommendation — no pressure, no obligation.

steps.title: We Get to Work
steps.description: Our certified technicians arrive on time with the right parts and expertise. Whether it's a new spa install, a repair, or a water test, we handle it all professionally.

steps.title: Enjoy Perfect Water
steps.description: Your hot tub stays warm, your pool stays clear, and your home water runs clean. If anything is off, we come back and make it right — that's our 45-year promise.

about.label: Why Summit County Trusts Us
about.headline: 45 Years of Mountain Water Expertise — One Family, One Mission
about.description: Since 1979, Kaupas Water — now High Country Aqua Tech — has been Summit County's go-to team for hot tubs, pools, and water systems. We understand the unique challenges of high-altitude water care: hard mountain water, extreme temperature swings, and equipment that needs to perform at 9,000+ feet. Our certified technicians treat every home like their own.

features.title: Authorized Premium Dealer
features.description: Official dealer for Caldera Spas and EcoWater Systems — only the best brands make it to your home.

features.title: Emergency Response Ready
features.description: Hot tub down in January at 10,000 feet? We respond fast with same-day and next-day emergency service.

features.title: Residential & Commercial
features.description: From single-family cabins to large resort properties, we scale our services to fit your exact needs.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Mountain-Honest Service.
pricing.subtitle: Every job starts with a clear quote. No hidden fees, no surprise charges — just fair pricing from a team that's been here for 45 years.

guarantee.headline: Our "Mountain-Solid" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any service we provide, we'll come back and make it right at no extra cost. We've built our reputation over 45 years on doing the job right the first time — and standing behind every single visit until you're happy.

faqs.question: What brands of hot tubs do you sell?
faqs.answer: We are an authorized Caldera Spas dealer, offering their full lineup including the Paradise, Vacanza, Utopia, and Fantasy series. From intimate 1-3 person models to large 6-8+ person spas, we'll help you find the perfect fit for your space and budget.

faqs.question: Do you handle emergency hot tub repairs?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We know a broken hot tub in a Colorado winter is more than an inconvenience — it can mean frozen pipes and costly damage. We offer fast-response emergency repairs, often same-day or next-day, to get you back up and running.

faqs.question: Can you test and treat my home's water?
faqs.answer: Yes! We provide professional water analysis and install EcoWater whole-home treatment systems including reverse osmosis, iron removal, and water softeners. Mountain water has unique challenges, and we'll recommend the right solution for your home.

faqs.question: Do you service commercial properties?
faqs.answer: We do. We work with lodges, hotels, HOA communities, and other commercial properties throughout Summit County. Our team handles scheduled maintenance, repairs, and compliance so your guests always have clean, safe water.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve all of Summit County, Colorado — including Silverthorne, Dillon, Frisco, Breckenridge, Keystone, and surrounding mountain communities. We've been the local water experts here since 1979.

testimonials.name: Seth L.
testimonials.text: My go-to folks for hot tub maintenance, well water filtration and more! So grateful for their responsiveness and work in Summit County.

testimonials.name: Sara R.
testimonials.text: Emergency repair — got the tub up and running and was a breeze to work with! Would recommend to anyone!

testimonials.name: Jacob T.
testimonials.text: Very impressed with the quality of service provided. The technicians were very knowledgeable, helpful, and skilled.

contact.headline:
Ready for Better Water
at Any Altitude?
contact.subtitle: Get a free consultation from Summit County's most experienced water care team. Whether it's a new hot tub, a repair, or whole-home filtration — we've got you covered.
benefits: Free water analysis with every consultation

footer.description: Summit County's trusted water experts since 1979. Hot tubs, pools, and home water systems.
